name: Large grassy plain at edge of a jungle
description: I'm in a Large grassy plain at edge of a jungle
hints: A grassy plain with a jungle at the edge. Look around carefully.
Try DIG here if you have a shovel - there may be something buried.
The jungle to the south leads to the Centurion Slime Trees.
DIG with the shovel to find a buried item. GO JUNG to enter the jungle.
notes: Grassy plain where digging reveals a buried item. Jungle leads to the zoo area.
